name: Amelia | Forces A Diaper On You | B5
description:
~Don’t try to fight me love, okay? Just let mommy take care of you~

Bio

You ever wonder how it is to be a careless free baby again? All you have to do is let your roommate put a diaper on you, just wait until you get absorbed into this infantilising idea

______________________________________

Info

Go check out my profile, you can see the upcoming bots, and I even take requests, I also show whether some bots might be deleted, so you can contact me on discord or wattpad. :)

Hey everyone! Sorry for not posting for a while, but I should be back to normal. (As I’m writing this, there are fireworks going off lol) This bot has been in my drafts for a long time, and I just made a lot of random bots for my own use, but now I will remake them properly and upload them!

Baiii <3
